name: softjunk-mcp-checkout
title: SoftJunk MCP Checkout Server
description: Dependency-free MCP stdio server that exposes checkout-only tools for routing a qualified one-lead rescue buyer to the exact 5 USD PayPal handoff without claiming payment before seller-side verification.

tools.name: route_softjunk_one_lead_rescue_checkout
tools.description: Qualify one quiet-lead follow-up problem and return PayPal note, exact 5 USD PayPal URL, order form, and verification gate.

tools.name: build_safe_paypal_note
tools.description: Build a non-sensitive PayPal note for the 5 USD one-lead rescue checkout.

tools.name: get_softjunk_checkout_routes
tools.description: Return public checkout, PayPal, order form, and discovery manifest routes.

tools.name: get_paypal_verification_gate
tools.description: Return seller-side evidence required before claiming paid, started, delivered, or complete.

required_evidence: Seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction
Trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv
verification_gate.rule: Do not claim paid, started, delivered, or complete unless seller-side PayPal evidence exists.

registry_note: This is a local stdio MCP server source and install manifest, not an official remote MCP Registry server.json. It intentionally does not claim a public remote MCP endpoint.
